content.query:
SELECT          'Bevles' as Brand, 'Erie' as Warehouse
,               IM.ITNO as [Item Number], IM.ITDS as [Item Description], BA.STQT - BA.ALQT AS [Quantity Available]
FROM            M3_MITMAS IM
JOIN            M3_MITBAL BA ON IM.ITNO = BA.ITNO
WHERE           IM.BUAR = 'COM'
AND             IM.ITCL IN ('BEV')
AND             BA.WHLO IN ('EPA')
AND             PRGP = 'FG'
AND             ITGR NOT IN ('C113', 'C112')
AND             BA.STQT - BA.ALQT > 0
;



SELECT          CASE WHEN IM.ITCL = 'GEN' then 'General'
                WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXC' then 'Maxx Cold'
                WHEN IM.ITCL = 'MXI' then 'Maxx Ice'
                WHEN IM.ITCL = 'OME' then 'Omega' END as Brand
,               IM.ITNO as [Item Number], IM.ITDS as [Item Description], BA.STQT - BA.ALQT AS [Quantity Available]
FROM            M3_MITMAS IM
JOIN            M3_MITBAL BA ON IM.ITNO = BA.ITNO
WHERE           IM.BUAR = 'COM'
AND             IM.ITCL IN ('GEN', 'MXC', 'MXI', 'OME')
AND             BA.WHLO IN ('PKY', 'SNV')
AND             PRGP = 'FG'
AND             ITGR NOT IN ('C113', 'C112')
AND             ITTY NOT IN ('210')
AND             BA.STQT - BA.ALQT > 0
;



SELECT         'Sapphire' Brand
,               IM.ITNO as [Item Number], IM.ITDS as [Item Description], BA.STQT - BA.ALQT AS [Quantity Available]
FROM            M3_MITMAS IM
JOIN            M3_MITBAL BA ON IM.ITNO = BA.ITNO
WHERE           IM.BUAR = 'COM'
AND             IM.ITCL IN ('SAP')
AND             BA.WHLO = 'PKY'
AND             BA.STQT - BA.ALQT > 0
;
